caribbean.headline: Caribbean Winds Increase
caribbean.paragraph: Turks & Caicos is experiencing east-northeasterly winds of 19 kt and wave heights of 5.6 ft, with a 55% chance of rain, while Barbados is seeing slightly stronger winds of 21 kt. I expect these conditions to impact maritime activities in the Eastern Caribbean and Lesser Antilles, particularly for small craft navigating through the region.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Winds Rise
mediterranean.paragraph: Marseille is experiencing strong southeasterly winds of 22 kt and wave heights of 4.9 ft, with a high probability of rain. Haifa is also seeing significant weather, with winds reaching 21 kt and a likelihood of precipitation, as a low-pressure system moves across the Eastern Mediterranean.
